← All tools

Tournament Bracket Builder

Make a single-elimination, double-elimination or round-robin bracket, type in results, and watch winners advance and standings update. Great for sports, spelling bees, debate rounds or any class competition — everything stays in your browser.

Set up

Seeding & order

    Examples

    How results & tiebreakers work
    • Elimination: click a name to mark them the winner, or type both scores (higher score wins). Winners advance automatically. Byes go to the top seeds. Changing an earlier result clears any later matches that depended on it.
    • Double elim: the loser of each winners-bracket match drops into the losers bracket (incoming losers are placed in reverse order to avoid instant rematches). The grand final can allow a "bracket reset" — if the losers-bracket champion wins game 1, a decider (game 2) is played.
    • Round-robin standings order: Points → Goal/point difference → Scored → Head-to-head (points between the tied teams) → Name (A–Z).
    Runs entirely in your browser · share a bracket by copying its link · a max tool
